title: Indulgent Silky Mediterranean Corn Pasta
description: A wine‑kissed, cream‑laden pasta with char‑grilled tomatoes and corn, topped with parmesan and basil for a crowd‑pleasing Mediterranean delight.
instructions: Boil the penne in salted water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil and butter over medium heat and sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
Deglaze the skillet with white wine, letting it reduce by half.
Add the heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer, stirring until slightly thickened.
Fold in the corn kernels, char‑grilled tomatoes, and capers, cooking for 2 minutes until warmed through.
Stir in the grated parmesan until melted and the sauce becomes silky.
Toss the cooked pasta into the sauce, mixing until evenly coated.
Season the pasta with sea salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped basil and serve immediately.
